page_content:
Formerly: SURV621.

Additional Information: SURV640 and SURV641 must be taken in consecutive semesters.

SURV642 Project Consulting (6 Credits)

Students will apply the core skills that they learned in the IPSDS program to address real-world problems. The course will provide experience

with the steps involved in carrying out a data consulting project, such

as discussing the problems to solve with a client, data handling, and communicating work in both written and oral forms. The project is completed in teams (3-4 students per team).
